characters.name: 12 Year Old Girl and a Donkey
characters.description: 12 Year Old Girl and a DonkeyBiographical informationFull nameUnknownAge12OccupationProstituteDescriptive informationGenderFemaleRaceCaucasianHair colorBlonde (girl) Brown (donkey)SexualityUnknownReligionUnknownPortrayalVoiced byCree SummerGirl)The12-Year-Old Girl and a Donkeyare two gag characters in the show that first appeared in the episodeThe Lemon-AIDS Walk.Captain Herohas recurrently told people about a sexual fantasy he has, involving a 12-year-old girl and a donkey, and in the episode The Lemon-AIDS Walk, they actually appeared as characters. In the episodeHot Tub,Captain HerotoldSpankythat he wishes there were more hot chicks in the house with them and wished for a hot black chick which coincidentally happened just before the debut ofFoxxy Love. Believing that he summoned her through the front door by wishing for her, Captain Hero used this power for more of his sexual fantasies and wished for a 12-year-old girl and a donkey and he stood there, watching the door, waiting for a long time, until he finally realized that she wouldn't come. In the episodeThe Lemon-AIDS Walk, Foxxy started a drug intervention for Captain Hero's steroid abuse and lured him downstairs by opening the door and calling out "Oh, you must be here to see Captain Hero because you are a 12-year-old girl and a donkey." Captain Hero came rushing downstairs in excitement and said "What?Matthew BroderickandSarah Jessica Parkerare here?" only to find out, he had been suckered into going to the intervention. It was shortly after revealed that the 12-year-old girl and a donkey were actually legit, as they were seen at the intervention where the 12-year old girl told him that steroids caused fits of rage. This set Captain Hero off and he attacked everyone in the room and killed them, including the 12-year-old girl and a donkey. During his roid rage, he was seen punching the girl off the donkey and then socking the donkey in the face. The 12 year old girl and a donkey fought back, as the girl was riding on the donkey, screaming and holding a sword like in a joust. but then Captain hero impaled the donkey with a giant wooden pole and killed them both. Their dead corpses were later seen, lying on the ground.

characters.name: Aurora
characters.description: Aurora, referred to asSleeping Beauty, is the princess from the Disney movieSleeping Beauty. She appeared in the Drawn Together episode "Spelling Applebee's" as one ofPrincess Clara's friends, along withArielandSnow White. At the end of the episode,Captain Heroblew up their carriage, causing them all to die in there. Sleeping Beauty was unable to keep herself alive because she had been impaled through the chest by a giant unbroken shard of glass and scarred by many tinier ones. Clara tried to help her and Sleeping Beauty tried very hard to grasp on to her life but she eventually became too "tired" to continue living and she went to her eternal sleep, dropping dead in her arms. She is voiced byCree Summer.

characters.name: Bambi
characters.description: BambiBiographical informationFull nameBambiAgeUnknown, likely 6 or underOccupationArmy LeaderDescriptive informationGenderMaleRaceDeerHair colorBrown FurSexualityUnknownReligionUnknownPortrayalVoiced byTara StrongBambiis a deer that comes from the Disney movie of the same name. He was featured as a character in the Drawn Together episodeN.R.A.y RAY, getting revenge on Captain Hero for killing his mother. Bambi is a little fawn with light brown fur. He has spots on his head and a light tan tail. He also has dark brown eyes. Bambi appears to be a happy, innocent and joyful little deer who is very nice to other people even if they have done as much as killing his mother. He was very miserable and felt empathy for his mother's death and begged Captain Hero to rid the world of all assault rifles and armor piercing bullets. However, he is not what he comes across as. He is truly an evil murderous psychopath, bent on dominating the planet who killed his own mother in order to trick Captain Hero into ridding the world of weaponry, so that he would be able to lead his army of deer, attack them all, and then rule the world. characters.name: Barry the Chicken
characters.description: Barry the ChickenBiographical informationFull nameBarry the ChickenAgeUnknownOccupationCock FighterDescriptive informationGenderMaleRaceMexican (Chicken)Hair colorNoneSexualityHeterosexualReligionChristianPortrayalVoiced byEric BauzaBarry the Chickenis an anthropomorphic chicken who is used in cock fights. He appeared in the episodeMexican't Buy Me Love. Barry the Chicken was released into battle againstLing-Ling, and Ling-Ling was about to kill him, but he decided to spare his life, remembering that earlier,Jose Lenotold him that chickens are a peaceful race. After that, Barry went back to the chicken coop to tell the other chickens that he killed Ling-Ling in battle. Ling-Ling then appeared in the coop, proving him to be a liar. The other chickens turned on him, believing that he didn't fuckShakiraeither. They were about to kill him, until Ling-Ling spared his life again, saying that they should take down the greater enemy, which wasThe King of Mexico. The chickens and Ling-Ling went off to fight him, and Barry then took control of the chicken army and led them all to destroy the King of Mexico once and for all.

characters.name: Bill Cosby
characters.description: Bill CosbyBiographical informationFull nameWilliam Henry Cosby Jr.Age78OccupationStand-Up ComedianDescriptive informationGenderMaleRaceAfrican AmericanHair colorGraySexualityHeterosexualReligionChristianPortrayalVoiced byJess harnellBill Cosby (Born July 12 1937)is a famous stand-up comedian and actor. He appeared inDrawn Togethera few times, where they made jokes about him sexually abusing children. In the episodeUnrestrainable Trainable, he was voiced byJess Harnell. InToot Goes Bollywood, he was voice by and portrayed by Otis Day. Bill Cosby first appeared in the Drawn Together episodeUnrestrainable Trainable. When it was shown that the entire reservoir full of pudding was empty, he was seen, looking at it, and crying, saying that without the pudding, he's just another unemployed sexual predator. In the episodeToot Goes Bollywood, a parody of Bill Cosby's Fat Albert cartoon was seen. Otis Day, played the role of a live action Bill Cosby who appeared in between scenes like he did in the original series. Here, Bill was portrayed as a murderous, homeless criminal who robbed people, raped women, did drugs, and basically committed to all the racist stereotypes against Black people being criminals. Also, a gang calledPhat Allen and his Junkyard Palswere seen the one who portrayed Bill Cosby, himself, was parodied and renamed William. William had no lines of dialogue, however, they did make some jokes about Bill Cosby being a pedophile. For instance:Foxxy Loveaccused Phat Allen and his Junkyard Pals for gang banging her, but Phat Allen denied this saying, "We're not Bill Cosby, we're just his creations." Bill Cosby is a wacky comedian. His style is to either say a hilarious phrase or make a funny gibberish noise. Although he is a silly and happy comedian in the public sphere, he is really a misogynist pedophile who spends his free time raping children and abusing women. He acts this way because this is the time in his life where he is no longer comically relevant and his jokes have ceased to be popular. Now that his life has gone down the crapper, he spends his time in court denying the fact that he violates women and children for funzies.

characters.name: Bizzaro Captain Hero
characters.description: Bizzaro Captain HeroBiographical informationFull nameBizzaro Captain Leslie HeroAge28 (deceased)OccupationSuperheroDescriptive informationGenderMaleRaceBizzaroHair colorBlackSexualityHomosexualReligionUnknownPortrayalVoiced byJess Harnell Bizzaro Captain Herois theBizzaroversion ofCaptain Hero. He appeared in the episodeGay Bash. Bizzaro Captain Hero is a superhero and theBizzaroversion ofCaptain Hero. He is a homage to the Bizarro characters (mainlySupermanandLois Lane) fromDC Comics, who were weird, twisted versions of the originals, and they often spoke in a deep-pitched voice and in sentences that didn't follow grammar rules. He is known for his muscular build, superpowers, and costume. Some parts of his appearance look different from what Captain Hero's body and clothing was. He has gray skin and a chiseled jawline with a prominent goatee. His costume consists of a dark red tunic with a square "H" on the chest, matching shorts, and a red belt with a H buckle. He also wears a green cape, red gloves, and red boots. Bizzaro Captain Hero's personality is basically the opposite of Captain Hero's. Also, similar to his personality, the word "bizarro" refers to anything that is strange, unusual, or a reverse version of something else, especially when it has a weird sense of logic or ethics, just like him. He is a tragic, imperfect, and misunderstood superhero who looks physically distorted but really wants to help, even though he often ends up causing unintentional harm. Captain Hero doesn't really like him and doesn't allow him to do anything that could be misinterpreted as he knows it, even when it happens outside of Bizzaro World. Also, Bizzaro World was mentioned by Captain Hero a couple of times, which is a fictional planet in the DC Comics universe, where he usually lives, just like other Bizzaros do.

characters.name: Bleh
characters.description: BlehBiographical informationFull nameBlehAge20OccupationUnknownDescriptive informationGenderFemaleRaceCaucasianHair colorRedSexualityHeterosexualReligionChristianPortrayalVoiced bySarah Silverman BlehisPrincess Clara'smentally challengedcousin, her condition being the result of her motherdrinking while she was pregnant. She sleeps in a pet carrier, and she had a short-lived relationship withCaptain Hero, with neither of them realizing that the other entered into the relationship to win a bet. Bleh's name is a reference toThe Facts of Life, a reference to howBlair Warner'shandicapped cousin pronounced Blair's name. Bleh is voiced bySarah Silverman. Bleh's overall appearance seems to resembleArielfromThe Little Mermaid; of course, this is because she is essentially a redheaded version of Clara, whose design is directly based on that of Ariel. Bleh is a stereotypical mentally challenged girl who is always walking around in awkward positions and doesn't make any sense most of the time she talks. However, she may be more smart than she comes on because, at the end ofThe Other Cousin, it turns out that her entire relationship withCaptain Herowas all just becauseSpanky Ham's mentally challenged cousin made a bet with her, telling her to do that. Also, when she stripped herself, and got in the hot tub with Captain Hero and Spanky, she seemed to not be moving in her normal, awkward position way, but in a more smooth and even seductive way, meaning that she was possibly doing this on purpose in order to seduce Captain Hero into dating her so that she would get the $50 that Spanky's mentally challenged cousin bet her. She was also able to escape her cradle by herself whenPrincess Clarathought that only she was able to lock and unlock the cage door to it. Bleh is also kind of obsessed with sex as she made Captain Hero have sex with her in that episode when he really didn't want to, and she got them locked into a really twisted position, not to mention the way she seduced him and Spanky, earlier in the hot tub. This could suggest that she is much smarter than she seems and may only be slightly disabled, but pretending to exaggerate her disability. She possesses the ability tocount cards; this ability was inspired byDustin Hoffman's character inRain Man.

characters.description: Blue BallBiographical informationFull nameBlue BallAge71("Hot Tub")OccupationBall Pit BallDescriptive informationGenderMaleRaceBallHair colorBaldSexualityUnknownReligionUnknownPortrayalVoiced byJames Arnold TaylorBlue Balllabeled"Fairytale Advisor"is a talking blue ball in a ball pit from the episode "Hot Tub". characters.description: Bob GuineyBiographical informationFull nameRobert Bob GuineyAge54OccupationTV PersonalityDescriptive informationGenderMaleRaceCaucasianHair colorBrownSexualityHeterosexualReligionUnknownPortrayalVoiced byMatt Silverstein Bob Guineyis a TV personality and a consultant for Lincoln Financial. He earned the nickname "the funny one". His nickname came from his humorous personality during his time on the first season ofThe Bachelorette. He appeared in the Drawn Together episodeClara's Dirty Little Secret. Bob Guiney is a tall and humorous man. He has brown, wavy hair styled in a short cut. His clothing consists of a black tuxedo jacket, a white dress shirt, a green vest and a green bow tie. He has black pants and black dress shoes.

characters.name: Bob the Cucumber
characters.description: Bob the CucumberBiographical informationFull nameBob the CucumberAgeUnknownOccupationReligious ProtesterDescriptive informationGenderMaleRaceVegetableHair colorBaldSexualityAsexual (repressed)ReligionRoman CatholicPortrayalVoiced byJames Arnold Taylor Bob the Cucumberand his associateLarry the Tomatoare members of the VeggieFables, parodies of theVeggieTales. A religious propaganda disguised as a kid show. Bob and Larry specifically parodied the two "VeggieTales" protagonists, Bob the Tomato and Larry the Cucumber; the names were simply reversed. They appeared in the episodeClum Babies. He is voiced byJames Arnold Taylor. Bob is a giant, green, human-sized, anthropomorphic cucumber. He has big cartoon eyes and big eyebrows of a darker shade of green and a little round green nose and a mouth with one tooth on the roof of it. His tooth sticks out of his mouth when it is closed. He has arms which are a slightly brighter shade of green than the rest of his body, and he wears white gloves on the hands and has no legs. Bob was an insane religious fanatic, who suffered from an extreme case of psychosis, causing him to cling to the comforting belief of a higher power. When his beliefs were challenged, he furiously snapped and went on a murderous shooting spree, killing nearly everyone in the house (except for Wooldoor) in order to "save" them from going to hell. However, Wooldoor's Clum Baby cured him of his psychosis, and after realizing what he had done, shot himself in remorse. In addition to being a VeggieTales parody, he is a satirization of conservative Christians (specifically fundamentalists and traditionalist Catholics) and religious extremists.

characters.name: Toot Braunstein
characters.description: Toot BraunsteinCharacter modelIn the showBiographical informationFull nameToot BraunsteinAge22("Hot Tub")RelationsUnnamed motherUnnamed fatherUnnamed Nicagaruan baby(adoptive daughter)Unnamed grandkidUnnamed sisterOccupationPin-up girlDescriptive informationGenderFemaleRaceWhiteHair colorBlackSexualityHeteroflexibleReligionJewish (implied)PortrayalVoiced byTara Strong(English)Victoria Cabello (Italian) (Season 1 only)Lisa Mozzotti (Italian) (Season 2-3)Evelyn Soares(Latin American Spanish)Piroska Kokas (Hungarian)Kathrin Gaube (German)Valérie Karsenti (French)Marina Bakina (Russian) Toot Braunstein, or simply known asToot, is a character and one of the protagonists of the animated seriesDrawn Together. One of the eight housemates who are the focus of the show, Toot is labeled as an outdated black and white heartthrob from the 1920s. She is voiced byTara Strong. Toot is a suicidalborderline personalitywho copes with life throughalcoholism,binge eating, andself-mutilation. According to Tara Strong, Toot lives in a fantasy world, insisting that she is still a beautiful sex symbol under the delusion that all the men want her[3]. Her extreme gluttony is one of her most exploited traits; Toot is known for eating indigestible objects such as a TV and a cell phone, particularly when frustrated (she eats the TV when she is unable to find the remote in "The Other Cousin"). In "A Tale of Two Cows", Toot ate wall insulation that she thought was cotton candy, which made her mouth bleed. She frequently consumes enormous amounts of food in one sitting, and on occasion even resorts tocannibalism. (SeeUnusual items eaten, below.) Toot onceate Ling-Lingaccidentally during an eating binge (she later regurgitated him), andate Wooldooronce after announcing she could not stop eating (eventually defecating him into a puddle on the floor after adding that she hadirritable bowel syndrome). She is also quite fond of cheese, as she is often seen eating cheese-related products; in "Hot Tub" she carries a can of spray cheese around with her for much of the episode, and in "N.R.A.y RAY", she wishes for a large amount of cheese. Her drinking is also mentioned frequently; her dependence on alcohol is in evidence in several different episodes, most notably in "Dirty Pranking No. 2" and "Captain Girl". She is a member ofAlcoholics Anonymous, though this has not curtailed her drinking to any visible degree; a phone conversation with her sponsor seems to indicate her unwillingness to admit how much of a problem she has. Toot is often prone to fits of rage and physical aggression seemingly at random. Toot legitimately cannot understand why men are not attracted to her, and has developed a distinct bitterness because of it. In thefirst episode, she had a crush on Xandir, but her affections were unrequited. When it was revealedthat he was gay, she comforted herself by saying that was the only reason why he didn't want to go out with her, until Wooldoor told her that "nobody likes fat

characters.name: Brian Dunkleman
characters.description: Brian DunklemanBiographical informationFull nameBrian DunklemanAge43OccupationClip Show Host (Unemployed)Descriptive informationGenderMaleRaceCaucasianHair colorBlackSexualityHeterosexualReligionUnknownPortrayalVoiced byMatt SilversteinBrian Dunklemanis a former co-host on American Idol. He appeared in the Drawn Together episodeAmerican Idol Parody Clip Show, replacing the role ofThe Jew Produceras the host, after he had killed himself. In the episodeAmerican Idol Parody Clip Show,The Jew Producerhad gone mad with insanity, hearing thatXandirhad denied them ever being in a sexual relationship. He had an emotional breakdown on live television and shot himself. Because of his death, his position as the show's host was instantly filled by former American Idol Co-Host, Brian Dunkleman, who was happy to be on the show. Brian introduced Xandir to the stage, where he sang the songFire the Load, which landed him in the "Not safe" zone. He then sentSpanky Hamon stage to sing hisrepriseofI wanted you to know. By the time Spanky was done, Brian was frozen in fear, being afraid of how everyone is staring at him, and not wanting to screw up his career at the clip show host like he did with the American Idol co-host. Being paralyzed in fear, Spanky temporarily takes over for him as the host and deems himself safe.FoxxyandClarasing theirrepriseofLa-la-la-la Labiaand at this time, Brian has come back to earth again. He deems Foxxy safe and Clara not safe. When it comes to voting off the not safe contestant, the three on the chopping block are Clara, Xandir, andWooldoor. However, Brian votes offMunchkin Mouse, a character who the audience has never been introduced to, but the cast of the series pretends to have known forever. At the end of the episode, everyone mimics Brian Dunkleman's lack of success, by sadly leaving the stage, carrying boxes of their belongings and into a room titled "Unemployment".

characters.name: Bucky Bucks
characters.description: Bucky BucksBiographical informationFull nameBucky BucksAge30's or 40'sOccupationBillionaireDescriptive informationGenderMaleRaceJewishHair colorBlondSexualityBisexualReligionUnknownPortrayalVoiced byChris EdgerlyBucky Bucksis a multi-millionaire who runs an empire. He appeared in the episodeThe One Wherein There Is a Big Twist. He told the Drawn Together cast that he wanted to buy their show when he heard that they wanted it cancelled so that they could free themselves and so he decided to buy their show and set them up on a series of challenges to see who would be the supreme winner of Drawn Together before it was cancelled. However, this was all a trick as Bucky Bucks was later revealed to really beThe Jew Producerin disguise and the challenges were just a trick to get a second season. He is voiced byChris Edgerly. Bucky Bucks appeared in the episodeThe One Wherein There Is a Big Twist, coming into the house and declaring that Drawn Together has been officially cancelled. Because of this, he wants one member of the cast to reign alongside him as he builds a million dollar empire in the place of the Drawn Together house. He sets up a series of challenges for them to go along with and the winner would be the one to go with him. Everyone except for a skeptical Toot, believing that this is all a trick, complies with this. One by one, Bucky fires people from the game in the order of Wooldoor, Ling-Ling, Xandir, Clara, Captain Hero, Spanky Ham. Every time Bucky fired someone, he would have a big crap on himself. When it came down to the final two, Foxxy and Toot, they were put into a fighting arena full of Jell-O. Foxxy won the fight and the entire game, overall, only to find out that Bucky Bucks was lying about the whole thing, and that he was reallyThe Jew Producerwearing a costume. He then ditched the costume and the entire alter-ego of Bucky Bucks and ran off. Bucky Bucks is a costume worn byThe Jew Producer. The costume is of a short little man with shiny blonde hair, worn in a mullet, exactly like the one worn by The Jew Producer, himself. Bucky wears a black tuxedo with a white shirt and blue pants and a red bowtie. He is intended to be a parody on Donald Trump and Richie Rich. Bucky Bucks is a sadistic multi-millionaire producer who runs a large corporation where he makes people do dangerous and humiliating things on public television, only so he can get money. He is very greedy and he is obsessed with making as much money as he can without losing his chances at losing even a little bit. Bucky Bucks is very perverse and a nympho, spending as much time as he can engaging in sexual intercourse, which results in him receiving anal from people through a hole he installed in his own chair. Bucky is a liar and a trickster as he lied about his entire character, and revealed himself to be The Jew Producer in disguise, and reveal that the entire game show he made the Drawn Together cast play was a scam to earn rating for Drawn Together again, and get

characters.description: BumpersBiographical informationFull nameBumpersAgeUnknownOccupationSpanky's driverDescriptive informationGenderMaleRaceKangarooHair colorTan (fur)SexualityUnknownReligionUnknownPortrayalVoiced byChris EdgerlyBumpersis a cartoon kangaroo who rides a jetpack. He appeared in the episodeXandir and Tim, Sitting in a Tree. Bumpers was first seen in a cartoon that the Drawn Together gang was watching. He was flying on a jetpack as the show was ending. All the members made a bunch of comments on how they  hated the show they just watched. Later in the episode, upon being told that Drawn Together never knows how to end it's episodes,Spanky Hamsaid that it was untrue. Then, Bumpers bounced up on screen and took Spanky ham for a ride in his jetpack, leading the episode to the same ending as the one in the cartoon at the beginning of the episode. This was watched by the rest of the Drawn Together crew and reacted to in the same way as before.

Then, Bumpers bounced up on screen and took Spanky ham for a ride in his jetpack, leading the episode to the same ending as the one in the cartoon at the beginning of the episode. This was watched by the rest of the Drawn Together crew and reacted to in the same way as before.

characters.description: Captain She-RoBiographical informationFull nameCaptain She-RoAge35RelationsCaptain Hero(brother)Captain Hero's Son(son)Jeb-Hero(father)Captain Hero's mother(mother)OccupationSingle motherDescriptive informationGenderFemaleRaceZebulonianHair colorBlackSexualityHeterosexualReligionJewishPortrayalVoiced byCree SummerCaptain She-Rois Captain Hero's sister. She appeared in the episodeUnrestrainable Trainable. Captain She-Ro moved to earth and wanted to be the mother of a child, but by the age of 35, she was still single and couldn't get a man to fall in love with her. So, she went to the Sperm Bank and got some Zebulonian sperm, unknowing that it was her brother's. Thus, giving birth to a mentally challenged child. At the end of the episode, she decides to have sex with her own brother, thus giving birth to yetanothermentally challenged child. She is voiced byCree Summer. Captain She-Ro is a tall, muscular woman with broad shoulders and a strong, firm frame, strongly resembling Captain Hero's. Her face looks exactly like his only with less sculpted cheek bones. She has black, smooth, lush hair that she wears in a ponytail with a blue bow. She also wears black eyeliner and red lipstick. She wears a blue jumpsuit with a yellow cape. Her suit is so accurately similar to Captain Hero's that it is contradictory with her character. Her suit has the symbol of a letter "H" for "Hero inside of the male symbol, even though her last name being "She-Ro" and her being female. Like Captain Hero, she has a body deformity wherein T-Rex arms grow on her chest. It was also shown that her fertility egg also has the Captain Hero symbol on it.

characters.name: Chad Huffington
characters.description: Chad Huffington Chad Huffingtonis a character who appeared inDrawn Together Babies. The full title of his name is "Chad Huffington: heir to the Huffington pants fortune." He is the boyfriend ofCharlotte the Babysitterwho visited her while she was babysitting the Drawn Together Babies. However, the Drawn Together Babies has killed Charlotte before he came over and impersonated her so he wouldn't know. Chad told "Charlotte" that he was ready to tell his parents about them and ask for their consent for their marriage, but was afraid they would not accept. Sure enough, they didn't, but Chad married her anyway, sacrificing his affiliation with the Pants Fortune with regret. He married "Charlotte" and moved into a crummy and run-down apartment with her only to find her cheating on him withhis rebellious brother Chaseshortly after. He and Chase got into a huge fight which was cut short once they found out that "Charlotte" was "going into labor" (which was really justSpanky Hampeeing). They took her to the hospital where "Charlotte" was "giving birth". Eventually,Ling-Lingcame out and they assumed that Charlotte was cheating on both of them withDr. Lingstein. After this, Chad and Chase decided to forget about Charlotte before they they made up and became friends. Chad is a handsome young man with a dark blonde mullet and black eyes. Chad is a very literate and fancy man who comes from a rich family who run a successful business. He is also very obsessed with pants as they are the product that his family company made that was so immensely popular, it made them billionaires.

characters.name: Chad's Rebellious Brother Chase
characters.description: Chad's Rebellious Brother ChaseBiographical informationFull nameChase HuffingtonAge20OccupationNoneDescriptive informationGenderMaleRaceCaucasianHair colorBlackSexualityHeterosexualReligionUnknownPortrayalVoiced byIan Ziering Chaseis a character who appeared inDrawn Together Babies. Described asChad Huffington's rebellious brother, his name is exactly what it implies. He seems to be against his own family's pants fortune, as he doesn't wear pants and wears a kilt instead. For some reason, nobody simply addresses him as "Chase" and instead, always addresses him as the full drawn out "Chad's Rebellious Brother Chase". He has a habit of saying his sentences by stopping before the last word to light and smoke a cigarette, inhale, and then throw it on the ground and crush it and then say the final, surprising word to make it sound more dramatic, which turned into a running gag. It will usually be along the lines of "[blank]? (smokes cigarette) I don't even know what [blank] is." Chase is a very dark and profound person who treats everything in life maybe just a bit too dramatically. His dramatic personality is meant to parody the over the top drama of people in soap operas. Pretty much every sentence he says begins with him smoking a cigarette, taking a big, deep puff of it, and then dropping it on the ground and stepping on it. This adds dramatic effect to everything he says and makes what he says seem more important and vital to the story than it really is. Like his name says, he is very rebellious, and he makes up his own rules in life. One of the biggest rebellious actions he makes is that he is heir to the Huffington pants fortune, a company that became extremely rich off of inventing pants, but he does not abide their family product, as he never wears pants. Although he acts very dramatic and has a whole "dark knight" mood going on, he doesn't seem to give a damn about anything about life, and this dramatic mood is just the way he talks and acts. It can also be said that he takes his rebelliousness too seriously and sometimes just breaks the rules for the sake of breaking rules. His only true care and meaning in life is his love for Charlotte, and he has a very great and undying passion for being with her, which is probably the only real profound feelings he has for anything in his life. He wants to run away with Charlotte so that they can live a careless and rebellious life together and have them both be their only true meanings of their lives.
